creator: freebsd@oldach.net
text:
See also http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-emulation/2014-September/011831.html

But note the advice in this thread is wrong. The bug is not related to system/userland out of sync. On my machine, the entire system was built from source before the 4.3.12 port was installed, and works flawlessly with this port version. After upgrading to the 4.3.16 port I am getting the RTTermRegisterCallback error. After reverting back to the 4.3.12 port everything is fine again.
